creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 202367
patch for security/acme.sh

This patch updates security/acme.sh from 2.7.9 to 2.8.0.

Release Notes:
https://github.com/Neilpang/acme.sh/releases/tag/2.8.0

- Support TLS-alpn mode
- Support Post-As-Get
- Support Buypass.com CA
- Support 12 more dns api
- Bug fixes
